news.t: Analysts Expect The SPDR S&P 400 Mid Cap Value ETF Will Reach $57
Implied SPDR S&P 400 Mid Cap Value ETF Analyst Target Price: $57
Analysts Anticipate 12% Upside For The SPDR S&P 400 Mid Cap Value ETF
Analysts Predict 15% Upside For The Holdings Of The SPDR S&P 400 Mid Cap Value ETF
Sum Up The Parts: The SPDR S&P 400 Mid Cap Value ETF Could Be Worth $57
Analysts Anticipate The SPDR S&P 400 Mid Cap Value ETF To Hit $57

holdings.infoBox: MDYV is an equity ETF with a total of 303 individual holdings. The top holdings are TD SYNNEX stock at 1.25%, Reliance at 1.24%, US Foods Holding at 1.21%, WESCO International at 1.00%, and Performance Food Group Company at 0.95%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P 400 Mid Cap Value ETF (MDYV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Mid Cap 400 Value index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of US value stocks. Constituents are drawn from the Committee-selected S&P mid-cap 400. MDYV was launched on Nov 8, 2005 and is issued by State Street.
